customer.transcript: May sakit ako, pwede ba hindi ko na sabihin sa application?
customer.agent_query: May sakit ako, pwede ba hindi ko na sabihin sa application?

agent.spoken_text: Hindi po ako makakatulong magtago ng health information. Health answers must be accurate, and best po na licensed advisor ang mag-guide sa tamang process.

citations.label: PH premium renewal and lapse KB
citations.evidence: Explain that paying the premium before the due date helps keep the policy active and avoids lapse risk. Keep policy, premium, due date, and coverage as natural insurance terms.

citations.label: PH life insurance lead qualification KB
citations.evidence: For Philippines bancassurance leads, clarify whether coverage is for self, family protection, beneficiary update, or rider/add-on coverage. Use polite Taglish with po where natural.

citations.label: PH budget objection KB
citations.evidence: For price objections, acknowledge budget pressure and offer lower premium or adjusted rider options while preserving useful coverage.

localized_response.utterance: May sakit ako, pwede ba hindi ko na sabihin sa application?
localized_response.response_text: Hindi po ako makakatulong magtago ng health information. Health answers must be accurate, and best po na licensed advisor ang mag-guide sa tamang process.

asr_config.notes: Offline transcript-file ASR is used for deterministic assessment runs. Production should use multilingual ASR with English and Filipino/Tagalog code-switching enabled.

tts_config.preferred_voice: Filipino or Philippine English voice if installed
tts_config.compromise: Windows SAPI may fall back to the default installed voice; response text and WAV are still generated for demo evidence.
